children.label: D
children.text: A tribal organization, as defined in section 4() of the Indian Self-Determination and Education Assistance Act (()), or an economic enterprise, as defined in section 3(e) of the Indian Financing Act of 1974 (; ), whether or not such economic enterprise is organized for profit purposes or nonprofit purposes.ll25 U.S.C. 5304Public Law 93–26225 U.S.C. 1452(e)

children.label: i
children.text: has a per capita income of 80 percent or less of the State average; or

children.label: ii
children.text: has an unemployment rate that is one percent greater than the national average for the most recent 24-month period for which statistics are available; or

children.label: B
children.text: a reservation, as defined in section 3(d) of the Indian Financing Act of 1974 (; ).Public Law 93–26225 U.S.C. 1452(d)
The term “Secretary” means the Secretary of Defense acting through the Under Secretary of Defense for Acquisition and Sustainment.
The terms “State” and “local government” have the meaning given those terms in .section 6302 of title 31
The term “business entity” means a corporation, association, partnership, limited liability company, limited liability partnership, consortia, not-for-profit, or other legal entity.
